case_title: WOOD ROBBINS, LLP VS. GMG JANITORIAL, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER WOOD ROBBINS, LLP'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND FOR APPOINTMENT OF NEUTRAL ARBITRATOR IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. RESPONDENTS GMG JANITORIAL, INC. AND GINA GREGORI ARE REQUIRED TO ARBITRATE THE CLAIM BY WOOD ROBBINS FOR UNPAID ATTORNEY'S FEES PER THE JAMS STEAMLINED ARBITRATION RULES AND PROCEDURES. THE COURT APPOINTS MICHAEL D. RANAHAN OF THE JAMS SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: G. GONZALES; REPORTER: REYES F. HUNTER CSR#6576, EMAIL: RHUNTER@SFTC.ORG.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER WOOD ROBBINS, LLP'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND JUDGMENT IN CONFORMITY THEREWITH.PETITIONER WOOD ROBBINS, LLP'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. WOOD ROBBINS IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST RESPONDENTS GMG JANITORIAL, INC. AND GINA GREGORI IN THE PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF $36,490.01 PLUS COSTS PER THE MEMORANDUM OF COSTS PROCEDURE. ORDER AND JUDGEMENT ARE FILED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER AND JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Confirm Arb
Off Calendar Jan-17-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Diana Fung, Esq. 415-247-7900 of Wood Robbins LLP for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER WOOD ROBBINS, LLP's Motion To Confirm Arbitration award and Judgment in conformity therewith.

Petitioner Wood Robbins, LLP's motion to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed. Wood Robbins is entitled to judgment in its favor and against respondents GMG Janitorial, Inc. and Gina Gregori in the principal amount of $36,490.01 plus costs per the memorandum of costs procedure.

Order and Judgement are filed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/HK)

Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration And For Appointment Of Neutral Arbitrator
Off Calendar Jan-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Diana Fung, Esq. of Wood Robbins LLP, T:415.247.7900, for petitioner and moving party, by Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling. PETITIONER WOOD ROBBINS, LLP'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And For Appointment Of Neutral Arbitrator is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Respondents GMG Janitorial, Inc. and Gina Gregori are required to arbitrate the claim by Wood Robbins for unpaid attorney's fees per the JAMS steamlined arbitration rules and procedures. The court appoints Michael D. Ranahan of the JAMS San Francisco office.

ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration And For Appointment Of Neutral Arbitrator
Off Calendar Dec-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER WOOD ROBBINS, LLP Petition To Compel Arbitration And For Appointment Of Neutral Arbitrator is taken off calendar per the request of the moving party by email dated 12/7/17. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR No. 6840; Dept. 302.
